summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Outbox cold email application (iteration 2). Backend authentication system fully functional with JWT tokens. Frontend UI working correctly with new branding, teal colors, and dark mode. Critical clipboard permission issue found affecting copy functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard write permission denied - copy buttons trigger error overlay
ui_bugs.error_message: Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied

passed_tests: User registration working with JWT tokens
User login working with existing credentials
Session persistence via localStorage (survives page refresh)
Protected routes require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated)
Light/Dark mode toggle works and persists
Correct branding: 'Outbox' with tagline 'Generate Cold Emails using YOUR style'
UI uses teal colors (not blue-purple gradient)
Email generation without writing style uses natural default
Generated emails avoid em dashes and jargon
Generated emails are conversational and under word limit
All three output cards display (Subject, Body, Follow-up)
Theme toggle works on both auth page and main app
Responsive design and modern UI elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical clipboard permission issue: Copy buttons are completely broken due to 'Write permission denied' error. This blocks a core feature. Consider using fallback clipboard methods or requesting proper permissions.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (copy functionality broken, but all other features working)
